Read `AGENTS.md` first for project overview, tech stack, module structure, and documentation index.

Rules:
- Read `MEMORY.md` before starting any task to understand current progress.
- Follow instructions in `.ai/instructions/` for coding standards and conventions.
- When uncertain, mark as `<!-- 待确认 -->` instead of guessing.
- After completing a task, update `MEMORY.md`.
- All code comments must be in Chinese.
- Respond in Chinese.

Priority of information sources (when conflicts arise):
Build config / CI > Source code > Tests > README > Historical docs > Comments > Issues
